name: alloc_id
description: Returns the allocation/provenance object that pointer or reference p is derived from. None means p has no valid allocation provenance.

name: offset_in_alloc
description: Returns the byte offset of pointer or reference p from the beginning of its allocation.

name: alloc_live
description: Returns whether allocation a is live at program point site.

name: alloc_allocator
description: Returns the allocator instance or allocator identity that created allocation a.

name: alloc_layout
description: Returns the original layout associated with allocation a.

name: alloc_block_size
description: Returns the current usable size in bytes of allocation a.

name: size_of
description: Returns the size component of a layout-like or type-like value.

name: align_of
description: Returns the alignment component of a layout-like or type-like value.

name: is_power_of_two
description: Returns whether integer x is a power of two.
